summary: Session 5 (FINAL): combined operator UAT + both releases staged. (1) Combined 23-row UAT checklist (062-lightweight-verification-affordance-uat-checklist.json) subsuming Set 061's authored checklist: 11 rows AI-pre-verified with the deterministic check named per row (Set 058 convention; suite baseline Py 1216 pass/1 skip, TS 864 pass + 2 tracked Set-026 baseline fails, drift guards clean, live writer/migrator CLI runs on a generated workspace copy), 12 operator rows shaped as one ordered ~15-minute walk per the operator's minimize-UAT-time directive. OPERATOR UAT PASSED 2026-06-12 - all 12 walked rows Passes=true (operator-saved; the checklist-editor save appended a duplicate empty 23-row block, removed deliberately). (2) Local .vsix built pre-bump (UAT-on-local-build rule); fresh fixture workspace generated. (3) Post-UAT bumps: extension 0.29.0->0.30.0 (package.json + both lock nodes; CHANGELOG [0.30.0] names Sets 061+062, combined release), ai_router 0.16.0->0.17.0 (pyproject.toml + __version__; CHANGELOG [0.17.0]); repository-reference.md release table + version walk in PRE-PUSH wording. (4) Operator-requested README refresh: session-set-explorer-and-spec.png hero + getting-started.png; row-action/Copy Eval lists + new Lightweight-verification bullet; OLD hero png deliberately retained until 0.30.0 publishes (live 0.29.0 Marketplace page hotlinks raw@master). DEVIATIONS (flagged): (a) make-uat-workspace now pins dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath to the checkout .venv in the GENERATED workspace only (+pinning test; serves the UAT gate, zero-setup writer/migrator actions); (b) unplanned defect fix - migrator CLIs + check_migrations printed Unicode arrows/em-dashes crashing cp1252 (extension spawn-pipe encoding; Migrate-to-v4 exited 1 AFTER the in-place write succeeded) -> ASCII-only per project-guidance convention, 154 migrator tests re-run green; (c) README feature-list update beyond the screenshot request. Verification: gpt-5-4 R1 VERIFIED 0 issues ($0.1720) - first R1-clean round of the set; the up-front suite-baseline + gate-adjacent-context block (S3/S4 calibration) is credited. RELEASES HELD: tags vsix-v0.30.0 + v0.17.0 awaiting explicit operator authorization; run ids recorded post-publish.
